meta.title: AlVerKarDes
meta.description: AlVerKarDes - product search and price tracking

search.title: Search products
search.error: An error occurred while searching. The backend could not be reached, please try again later.

productDetail.fetchError: An error occurred while loading the product. The backend could not be reached, please try again later.
productDetail.noOffers: There are no offers recorded for this product yet.
productDetail.noHistory: There is no real price history for this product yet ({reason}).
productDetail.watchlistAddError: The item could not be added to your watchlist. Please try again later.
productDetail.watchlistLoginPrompt: Log in to add this product to your watchlist.
productDetail.watchlistLimitReached: You've reached the FREE plan watchlist limit.
productDetail.watchlistLimitReachedLink: Upgrade to PREMIUM for unlimited watchlist items.

register.heading: Register
register.successMessage: Your account has been created. You are being redirected to the login page...

dashboard.heading: My Account
dashboard.sessionError: Your session could not be verified. Please try logging in again.

watchlist.heading: My Watchlist
watchlist.fetchError: An error occurred while loading the watchlist. The backend could not be reached, please try again later.
watchlist.empty: There is nothing on your watchlist yet.
watchlist.removeError: The item could not be removed. Please try again later.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.intro: Enter the email address linked to your account. If it matches an account, we will send a password reset link to it.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If that email address is registered, we've sent a password reset link to it. Please check your inbox (and spam folder).
forgotPassword.rateLimitedMessage: Too many reset requests for this email address. Please wait a while before trying again.

resetPassword.heading: Reset your password
resetPassword.genericFailure: The password could not be reset. Please try again.
resetPassword.missingTokenMessage: This password reset link is invalid or incomplete. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. You are being redirected to the login page...

deals.heading: Deals
deals.fetchError: An error occurred while loading the deals feed. The backend could not be reached, please try again later.

message.BUY: This looks like a strong deal compared with recent price history.
message.WATCH: This is a reasonable offer, but watching for a better price may be worthwhile.
message.WAIT: This does not look like a strong deal right now.
message.SKIP: This does not look like a strong deal right now.
message.unknown: No assessment is available for this offer yet.

reasons.BLOCKED_SOURCE: From a store you have blocked

notificationPreferences.heading: Notification Settings
notificationPreferences.fetchError: An error occurred while loading your notification settings. The backend could not be reached, please try again later.
notificationPreferences.savedMessage: Your notification settings have been saved.
notificationPreferences.saveError: Your settings could not be saved. Please try again later.
notificationPreferences.thresholdLockedMessage: Customizing alert thresholds requires a PREMIUM subscription. Your current values remain unchanged.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.languageNote: This sets the language we use for emails we send you (e.g. password reset links). It does not change what language you're currently browsing in - use the language switcher above for that.
profile.countryLabel: Country (2-letter code, e.g. DE, AT, CH)
profile.saveError: Your profile could not be saved. Please try again later.
profile.validationError: Please check your input: the language must be German or English, and the country must be a 2-letter code.

billing.heading: Plan
billing.fetchError: An error occurred while loading your plan. The backend could not be reached, please try again later.
billing.mockDisclaimer: This is a demo/test checkout - no real payment is processed, the upgrade happens with a single click.
billing.actionError: The request could not be completed. Please try again later.
